taskTemplate.name: Pre-Underwriting Checklist
taskTemplate.description: Pre-underwriting checklist — organize documents, verify income, assets, insurance, and employment before submitting to underwriting

subTaskTemplate.name: Organize eFolder
subTaskTemplate.description: Organize eFolder – Park documents from file manager into the eFolder and ensure all items are labeled correctly; documents returned from borrower must be categorized and filed before verification begins

subTaskTemplate.name: Run AUS
subTaskTemplate.description: Run AUS – Submit loan to Automated Underwriting System (DU/LP) and review findings; AUS findings dictate documentation requirements for the file

subTaskTemplate.name: Verify Income
subTaskTemplate.description: Verify Income – Verify borrower income documentation (paystubs, W-2s, tax docs) matches application and calculate qualifying income

subTaskTemplate.name: Verify Insurance
subTaskTemplate.description: Verify Insurance – Determine if homeowners insurance (HOI) is on file and ready for underwriting review; marking Done confirms HOI is available and triggers insurance review; mark Issue to generate a condition for missing or insufficient coverage

subTaskTemplate.name: Verify Mortgage Statements
subTaskTemplate.description: Verify Mortgage Statements – Verify current mortgage statements are on file showing existing loan balances, payments, and expenses that are part of the mortgage

subTaskTemplate.name: Verify Purpose
subTaskTemplate.description: Verify Purpose – Verify the stated purpose of the HELOC is documented in a Letter of Explanation (LOE) or conversation log; mark Issue to trigger a condition for missing purpose documentation

subTaskTemplate.name: Verify Assets
subTaskTemplate.description: Verify Assets – Verify borrower assets and source of funds; review bank statements, verify account ownership, source large deposits, and calculate reserves

subTaskTemplate.name: Verify Employment
subTaskTemplate.description: Verify Employment – Verify borrower employment status and history; complete verbal or written verification of employment

subTaskTemplate.name: Self-Employed Income
subTaskTemplate.description: Self-Employed Income – Review tax returns (personal and business) and profit and loss statements for self-employed borrower income

subTaskTemplate.name: Non-Traditional Income
subTaskTemplate.description: Non-Traditional Income – Verify non-traditional income sources (Social Security, pension, disability) with award letters or other documentation

subTaskTemplate.name: Rental Income
subTaskTemplate.description: Rental Income – Verify rental income with lease agreements, tax returns, and rental history; calculate net rental income for qualifying purposes
